description_long: This is a large, upscale suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof and a spacious driveway leading to a double garage. The front facade features a prominent entryway with a covered porch, arched windows, and a mix of light-colored walls and darker roof tiles. The property is surrounded by a manicured lawn, several trees, and a fenced backyard that includes a swimming pool. The rear of the house has large windows and a patio area, providing ample natural light and outdoor living space. The side views reveal additional architectural details such as chimneys, awnings, and a variety of window shapes and sizes. The overall design suggests a blend of traditional and modern suburban architectural elements, emphasizing comfort, privacy, and curb appeal.
description: A large, elegant suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, double garage, manicured lawn, and a fenced backyard with a pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, double garage, driveway, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, garage, and the expanse of the lawn with trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, large windows, patio area, and the swimming pool within the fenced area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the backyard, fence, and additional landscaping with trees and shrubs.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of arched and rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent covered porch with steps, arched main door, and decorative columns
